name: io.github.OthmanAdi/ableton
description: Control Ableton Live from any LLM. The first MCP server built on Ableton's official Extensions SDK: one .ablx, no Remote Script, no Max for Live.
_loophole_publish_notes: DRAFT, not submitted. Three things must be true before this validates and publishes (see launch/REGISTRY.md). (1) @othmanadi/ableton-mcp must be published to npm at the matching version with package.json carrying "mcpName": "io.github.OthmanAdi/ableton" (the registry verifies npm ownership via that field equalling the name above). (2) Reconcile the transport honestly: the bridge runs INSIDE Ableton's Extension Host and binds streamable-http to 127.0.0.1 on a probed port (8420-8429) that the extension writes to storageDirectory/bridge.json; it is not a standalone server you launch with a fixed URL, and the npm package exports buildServer as a library, not an npx entry. So no fixed remotes[].url and no runtimeHint/npx is claimed here. Confirm at publish time whether the registry wants the per-machine local URL expressed as a remotes[] entry with a {port} variable or left to the package transport; pick whichever validates against the live 2025-12-11 schema without implying a runnable hosted endpoint. (3) Set the real published version in both version fields. Re-verify the schema URL and field names against the live registry docs at publish time; this draft was shaped from the 2025-12-11 schema reference and the 04_LAUNCH_SPEC publish workflow.
